positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    flies(john,sK1)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~arrival(sK1,lga)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~departure(X0,X2) | ~arrival(X0,X2)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~flies(susan,sK1)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~departure(X0,lga) | ~flies(susan,X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    susan != lga).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    arrival(sK0,lga)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    john != lga).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    susan != john).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    departure(sK1,lga)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    flies(susan,sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for negative.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    susan != lga).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    departure(sK1,lga)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    departure(sK2,lga)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    arrival(sK0,lga)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    ~arrival(sK2,lga)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~departure(X0,X2) | ~arrival(X0,X2)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    john != lga).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~arrival(sK1,lga)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    susan != john).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define flies(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
